title: NS Energy Cascade under Tropical Semiring v2

analysis.object: T527: NS Energy Cascade under Tropical Semiring v2 depth analysis

kolmogorov_cascade.description: Kolmogorov cascade: energy flows large->small scales; tropical MAX at each step
kolmogorov_cascade.reason: Energy cascade is EML-3 oscillatory transfer; tropical MAX picks dominant mode

tropical_closure.description: Tropical ring closure: cascade is MAX-PLUS closed; no energy escapes tropical semiring
tropical_closure.reason: Energy conservation is EML-2 constraint on EML-3 cascade

blowup_tropical.description: Blow-up = Deltad=inf from cascade; tropical semiring cannot prevent if stretching unbounded
blowup_tropical.reason: EML-inf blow-up occurs when cascade escapes tropical closure

analysis.theorem: T527: NS Energy Cascade under Tropical Semiring v2 (S806).

key_theorem: T527: NS Energy Cascade under Tropical Semiring v2 (S806).
